choices.text: Bluebeam Revu most popular for PDF takeoff; PlanSwift, STACK alternatives. BIM model auto-quantifies from 3D. RSMeans cost database (30k+ line items). Replaced manual paper + scale rulers.
Add markups to bare cost: overhead 8-15%, profit 5-10%, bond 1-3%, insurance 2-5%. Total markup 15-35%. Without markup, estimator loses money on every job.
